responseText:
Now I have the complete picture across all 74 drives, 17 charging sessions, and every day. Here's the full 10-day narrative for **ToughNut** (2023 Rivian R1S, Forest Green):

---

# 🟢 ToughNut — 10-Day Activity Summary
### Feb 27 – Mar 8, 2026

**The Big Picture:**
| Metric | Total |
|---|---|
| Total Distance | **1,077.9 miles** |
| Total Drives | **74** |
| Average Efficiency | **64%** |
| Charging Sessions | **17** |
| Energy Charged | **669.7 kWh** |
| Total Charging Cost | **~$54.10** |
| Phantom/Idle Range Lost | **124.3 mi** |

---

## 📖 The Narrative

### **Feb 27 (Friday) — Leaving Home, Heading North**
The 10-day adventure kicked off with a busy morning in Cornwall, CT — home base. Several short local hops around Popple Swamp Road and Kent Road suggested errands and preparations. Two brief Level 2 charges (~$0.88 and $0.90) topped the battery up at home. Then at **5:30 PM**, ToughNut launched on the first big leg of what would become an extended New England road trip: a **93.6-mile haul from Cornwall, CT to Bennington, VT** (1hr 58 min, 73% efficiency, max speed 97 mph) — burning from 67% down to 28%. Temps ranged from near freezing to 43°F, and 5,499 ft of climbing made that efficiency reading impressive.

At Bennington, a **DC fast charge at 215 kW** pumped in 27.8 kWh in just 11 minutes ($16.89), jumping from 28% → 46%. Then it was back on the road — a second leg of **58.1 miles to Ludlow, VT** arriving around 8:53 PM (25% battery). The car plugged in overnight at Plymouth, VT on a slow Level 1/2 charger (3 kW max), gaining 41.2 kWh over ~11 hours — **for free**.

**Feb 27 total: 118.4 mi, 10 drives, $1.78 spent**

---

### **Feb 28 (Saturday) — Skiing in Ludlow (Okemo Mountain)**
Woke up at Plymouth with a 53% charge. The morning drive of **5.8 miles to Ludlow** (39% efficiency — cold battery, mountain terrain) put ToughNut right near Okemo Mountain ski resort. The afternoon brought a short jaunt up **Mountain Road** — classic ski resort access — and back, 6.8 miles round trip. The R1S sat and charged again that night at the lodge (~Ludlow, slow 3 kW, $0), climbing from 43% → 85% over 15 hours. A big, free overnight top-up.

**Feb 28 total: 70.8 mi, 4 drives, $16.89 spent (the Bennington fast charge billing landed on this day)**

---

### **Mar 1 (Sunday) — Ski Day #2, Then the Long Haul Home**
Started with a morning ski run (~5.9 mi from the lodge). Then several very short moves around Ludlow in the afternoon — loading gear, shuttling people. At **3:30 PM**, the big drive home began: **123.5 miles from Ludlow, VT to Canaan, CT** in 2.5 hours (65% efficiency, 75%→17% battery, temps 0–33°F). Arrived nearly on empty with only 57 miles of range. Stopped in Canaan for a short errand. Hit a **DC fast charger in North Canaan, CT** at 212 kW — 34.1 kWh added in 12 minutes ($17.73), 14%→34%.

Then a late-evening side trip out to **Kent, CT** and back (25.6 miles total — possibly dropping someone off). Arrived home in Cornwall and plugged into the home charger at 9:16 PM — an **8-hour overnight charge** from 19%→85%, adding 83.3 kWh ($8.62).

**Mar 1 total: 131.1 mi, 5 major drives, $0 on the road (fast charge billed next day)**

---

### **Mar 2 (Monday) — Day Trip to the Berkshires, Then Back to Vermont**
Departed Cornwall early, drove **34.3 miles to Egremont, MA** (Berkshires). Midday run to **Great Barrington, MA** for what looks like lunch or an errand on Main Street. Then at 3:21 PM, a **major 71.9-mile drive from Great Barrington back north to Dover, VT** (2hr 11min, 62% efficiency). Arrived at Dover at 23% battery. Plugged in at a vacation property there — free overnight Level 2 charge (7 kW max), from 23%→85%, adding 77.9 kWh.

**Mar 2 total: 160.7 mi, 8 drives, $26.35 charged (overnight from previous day)**

---

### **Mar 3 (Tuesday) — Mount Snow + Road Trip to Stowe**
Woke up at Dover (85% charge) — that's Mount Snow ski territory. A quick early move from the lodging. Mid-morning short drives around Dover/West Dover suggest ski resort access at Mount Snow. Then a fascinating afternoon journey: drove **19 miles to Dummerston, VT** (along the Connecticut River valley), then **5.6 miles to Putney Landing Road** — a river-access spot near Brattleboro, suggesting a scenic or recreational stop. A brief afternoon charge top-up (+1.7 kWh) in Dover.

Then at 4:27 PM: **53.5 miles from Dummerston to West Lebanon, NH**, arriving at 33% battery. Fast charged at **217 kW** in West Lebanon for 23 minutes — 58.1 kWh added, **for free**, 33%→74%.

Finally, drove **77.2 miles from West Lebanon to Stowe, VT** (1hr 22min, 64% efficiency), arriving at Stowe's Talta Lodge Road at 7:31 PM with 38% remaining. Stowe is Vermont's premier ski resort.

**Mar 3 total: 158.9 mi, 9 drives, $0 charged (free DC fast + free lodging charge)**

---

### **Mar 4 (Wednesday) — Stowe Ski Day + Epic Return Journey**
Morning: local drives around Stowe — ski runs, heading up the mountain access roads. Stowe at 38% was getting tight; drove **17.7 miles to Waterbury, VT** (25% battery). From Waterbury continued **13.4 miles to Montpelier, VT** arriving at 18% — very low. Fast charged at **215 kW in Montpelier** — 45 kWh added in 14 minutes (18%→47%, **free**).

Then drove 55.7 miles to **Lebanon, NH** (Dartmouth/Upper Valley area) and fast charged again at **218 kW for 23 minutes** — 63.2 kWh added (27%→71%, **free**). Back on the road: a **114.5-mile dash from Lebanon, NH all the way to Holyoke, MA** — nearly 2 hours (67% efficiency, 71%→20%), arriving at 8:09 PM. Fast charged at **215 kW in Holyoke** for 32 min — 78.6 kWh (20%→75%, **free**). Then a short 8-mile cruise to Springfield, MA to end the night.

**Mar 4 total: 206 miles — the biggest driving day of the 10 days. 5 drives, 4 charging stops (3 DC fast), $0 out of pocket.**

---

### **Mar 5 (Thursday) — Coming Home**
Left Springfield early, drove through Windsor Locks, CT → Torrington, CT → **arrived back in Cornwall, CT by 9:16 AM**. Home. Plugged into the home charger at 9:51 AM (41%→70%, 39.6 kWh, $4.10). The afternoon brought local Cornwall errands — Cream Hill Road, Kent Road, Popple Swamp Road — typical home-base activity. Evening plugged in again (60%→85%, 31.3 kWh, $3.24).

**Mar 5 total: 96.2 mi, 10 drives, $4.10 home charging**

---

### **Mar 6 (Friday) — Local + Trip to Torrington**
A busy local day in Cornwall. Early morning short runs. Mid-morning drove to **Torrington, CT** (~14.5 miles) for what appears to be errands or appointments (stops on John Street, Barber Street, East Main Street). Back home to Cornwall by 1:40 PM. Afternoon: multiple short loops around Great Hollow Road and Cream Hill Road — classic Cornwall daily-life pattern.

**Mar 6 total: 65.7 mi, 13 drives (busiest drive-count day), $3.49 home charging**

---

### **Mar 7 (Saturday) — Quiet Day**
The calmest day of the trip. Only 4 drives totaling 10 miles — local Cornwall moves, including a stop on Chamberlain Road. One morning home charge ($1.50, 47%→57%). Battery mostly stayed around 47–57%.

**Mar 7 total: 10 mi, 4 drives, $1.50 charging**

---

### **Mar 8 (Sunday, Today) — Heading to Litchfield County**
A late-morning/afternoon trip out of Cornwall: **10.1 miles to Sharon, CT**, then over to **Litchfield, CT** (20.3 miles, 96% efficiency — the most efficient highway drive of the trip!), multiple moves around Litchfield (Whites Wood Rd, South Lake St, Doyle Rd) suggesting a social visit or event, then home to Cornwall arriving at 7:29 PM with only 18% battery. No charge yet today.

**Mar 8 total (so far): 60.2 mi, 6 drives**

---

## 🗺️ Route Footprint
The R1S covered a sweeping loop across **Connecticut → Vermont → New Hampshire → Massachusetts → back to Connecticut**, touching: Cornwall CT · Bennington VT · Ludlow/Okemo VT · Canaan/North Canaan CT · Kent CT · Dover/Mount Snow VT · Dummerston/Brattleboro VT · West Lebanon/Lebanon NH · Stowe VT · Montpelier VT · Waterbury VT · Great Barrington MA · Holyoke MA · Springfield MA · Windsor Locks CT · Torrington CT · Sharon CT · Litchfield CT.

## ⚡ Charging Strategy Highlights
- **5 DC fast charges** (all Rivian charging network, all 210–218 kW), 4 of which were **completely free**
- **12 Level 1/2 sessions** — mostly at lodging (free) or home (~$0.10/kWh)
- Smart "charge to 85%" discipline maintained throughout
- Never got stranded — closest call was arriving North Canaan at 14% on Mar 1

**What an adventure for ToughNut! 🏔️⛷️**

Let me pull all the data simultaneously — drives, charges, and aggregations for that full 10-day window.
Got it — the Rivian R1S "ToughNut" has VIN `7PDSGABA4PN010679`. Now let me pull everything at once.
